findings.location: sections.s2 — 精査クラスのコンポーネント設定ファイル XMLコード例
findings.description: Knowledge file adds `</list>` closing tag that does not appear in the source, and omits the `<!-- 中略 -->` comment that appears in the source between the last `</component>` and `</property>`. The source XML ends with `<!-- 中略 -->` followed immediately by `</property>` (no `</list>`). The knowledge file replaces this with `</list>` + `</property>` instead.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `    <!-- 中略 -->\n</property>` — no `</list>` tag present. Knowledge file: `  </list>\n</property>` — `</list>` added, `<!-- 中略 -->` removed.
